purpose: A single validation or informational message shown inside a MessagePopover. Groups semantic type (Error/Warning/Success/Information) with a title, description, and optional link to the source field.
whenToUse: As an item inside a MessagePopover to represent one validation issue
For form submission summaries with multiple issues
For batch operation results with per-item feedback
To let users click through to the field/row that produced the message
whenNotToUse: For inline validation on a single field — use valueState on the input
For a page-level banner — use MessageStrip
For a system-wide alert — use NotificationBanner
doRules: Include the field/row context in the description
Sort by severity: Error → Warning → Information → Success
Provide a link/action that takes user to the source of the issue
Use consistent phrasing (e.g. always start with the field name)
dontRules: Do not use color alone for type — always pair with icon
Do not truncate errors severely — users need to understand the problem
Do not put actionable content inside Success items
Do not stack more than 3 severities visually — flatten if needed

layoutGuidance.sizing: Height ~64px per item; width fills popover
layoutGuidance.alignment: Icon left · title+description middle · optional link right

contentGuidance.contentRules: Title states the problem; description gives context and suggests fix

responsiveBehavior.S: Only title visible; tap to expand

requirements: Each item has aria-labelledby pointing to its title
Keyboard: Enter/Space navigates to the source field
